# Nishant
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0"/>
<meta name="description" content="Nexus Spark – Business Consultancy, Training & Development, Career Counseling. Connect. Collaborate. Create."/>
<title>Nexus Spark | Connect · Collaborate · Create</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>

<style>
/* ============================================================
   CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES
   Palette inspired by Edward de Bono's 6 Thinking Hats
   + deep navy professionalism
   ============================================================ */
:root {
  /* Brand */
  --gold:        #C9922A;
  --gold-lt:     #E8B84B;
  --gold-pale:   rgba(201,146,42,0.10);
  --gold-border: rgba(201,146,42,0.22);
  --green:       #2E7D32;
  --green-lt:    #4CAF50;
  --green-pale:  rgba(46,125,50,0.10);
  /* Neutrals */
  --navy:        #0D1B2A;
  --navy-mid:    #111F30;
  --navy-lt:     #182840;
  --slate:       #1C2E42;
  --white:       #F8F6F1;
  --off-white:   #EDE9E0;
  --muted:       #7A90A8;
  --border:      rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  /* 6 Hats */
  --hat-white:  #D8D8CC;
  --hat-red:    #B71C1C;
  --hat-black:  #424242;
  --hat-yellow: #F9A825;
  --hat-green:  #2E7D32;
  --hat-blue:   #1565C0;
  /* Type */
  --ff-head: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  --ff-serif:'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  /* Spacing */
  --sec: 88px;
  --sec-sm: 56px;
}

/* ============================================================
   RESET & BASE
   ============================================================ */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
body {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: var(--white);
  font-family: var(--ff-head);
  line-height: 1.65;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}
img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }
a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }
ul { list-style: none; }
button { font-family: var(--ff-head); }

/* custom scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--navy); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--gold); border-radius: 2px; }

/* ============================================================
   LAYOUT HELPERS
   ============================================================ */
.wrap    { max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.wrap-sm { max-width: 820px;  margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }

/* ============================================================
   TYPOGRAPHY HELPERS
   ============================================================ */
.tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--gold); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
  padding: 5px 16px; border-radius: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.sec-title {
  font-family: var(--ff-head);
  font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 46px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 1.05;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.sec-sub {
  font-size: 15px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85;
  max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto;
}
.sec-head { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 52px; }

.gold  { color: var(--gold); }
.green { color: var(--green-lt); }

/* ============================================================
   BUTTONS
   ============================================================ */
.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 13px 28px; border-radius: 5px;
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: all .25s; cursor: pointer; border: none;
}
.btn-gold   { background: var(--gold);   color: var(--navy); }
.btn-gold:hover  { background: var(--gold-lt); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(201,146,42,.35); }
.btn-out    { background: transparent; color: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border); }
.btn-out:hover   { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.btn-red    { background: #CC0000; color: #fff; }
.btn-red:hover   { background: #AA0000; transform: translateY(-2px); }

/* ============================================================
   SCROLL-REVEAL
   ============================================================ */
.sr        { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); transition: opacity .65s ease, transform .65s ease; }
.sr-l      { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-28px); transition: opacity .65s ease, transform .65s ease; }
.sr-r      { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(28px);  transition: opacity .65s ease, transform .65s ease; }
.sr.on, .sr-l.on, .sr-r.on { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
.d1 { transition-delay: .1s; } .d2 { transition-delay: .2s; }
.d3 { transition-delay: .3s; } .d4 { transition-delay: .4s; }
.d5 { transition-delay: .5s; }

/* ============================================================
   6-HAT STRIPE
   ============================================================ */
.hat-stripe { display: flex; height: 4px; }
.hat-stripe span { flex: 1; }
.hs-w  { background: var(--hat-white);  }
.hs-r  { background: var(--hat-red);    }
.hs-b  { background: var(--hat-black);  }
.hs-y  { background: var(--hat-yellow); }
.hs-g  { background: var(--hat-green);  }
.hs-bl { background: var(--hat-blue);   }

/* ============================================================
   NAVBAR
   ============================================================ */
#nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 9000;
  background: rgba(13,27,42,0.97);
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: box-shadow .3s;
}
.nav-inner {
  max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  height: 66px;
}
.nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.nav-brand img { height: 42px; width: auto; }
.nav-brand-text strong {
  display: block;
  font-size: 15px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: var(--gold); line-height: 1;
}
.nav-brand-text small {
  display: block; font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted); margin-top: 3px;
}
/* Desktop links */
.nav-links {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px;
}
.nav-links a {
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted); position: relative; padding: 4px 0;
  transition: color .2s;
}
.nav-links a::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;
  background: var(--gold); transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform .25s;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
.nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
.nav-links .nav-cta {
  background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy) !important;
  padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 800;
}
.nav-links .nav-cta::after { display: none; }
.nav-links .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--gold-lt); }

/* Hamburger */
.ham {
  display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px;
  background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px;
}
.ham span { display: block; width: 22px; height: 2px; background: var(--gold); border-radius: 1px; transition: all .3s; }
.ham.open span:nth-child(1) { transform: translateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }
.ham.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }
.ham.open span:nth-child(3) { transform: translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }

/* Mobile drawer */
.nav-drawer {
  display: none;
  flex-direction: column;
  background: rgba(13,27,42,0.99);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 20px 24px 28px;
  gap: 0;
}
.nav-drawer.open { display: flex; }
.nav-drawer a {
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted); padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: color .2s;
}
.nav-drawer a:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.nav-drawer a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
.nav-drawer .nd-cta {
  margin-top: 16px; background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-align: center; padding: 13px; border-radius: 5px; border-bottom: none !important;
}

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 1 — BRAND HERO
   ============================================================ */
#hero {
  min-height: 100vh; padding: 88px 24px 60px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden; text-align: center;
}
.hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 65% 50% at 50% 25%, rgba(201,146,42,.07) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 45% 40% at 15% 75%, rgba(46,125,50,.05) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 55% at 88% 65%, rgba(21,101,192,.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
}
.hero-grid {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(201,146,42,.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(201,146,42,.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 68px 68px;
}
.hero-body { position: relative; z-index: 2; width: 100%; max-width: 860px; }

.hero-logo {
  width: clamp(160px, 35vw, 230px);
  margin: 0 auto 36px;
  animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 36px rgba(201,146,42,.22));
}
@keyframes float {
  0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50%      { transform: translateY(-10px); }
}
.hero-eyebrow {
  font-size: clamp(10px, 1.5vw, 12px); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 5px;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.hero-title {
  font-size: clamp(50px, 11vw, 104px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 4px; line-height: .9;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.hero-title .ht2 { color: var(--gold); }
.hero-tag {
  font-family: var(--ff-serif); font-style: italic;
  font-size: clamp(15px, 2.5vw, 22px);
  color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 44px;
}

/* 3-C Blocks */
.c3 {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  border: 1px solid var(--gold-border); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden;
  max-width: 620px; margin: 0 auto 44px;
}
.c3-item {
  padding: 22px 14px; transition: background .3s; cursor: default;
}
.c3-item + .c3-item { border-left: 1px solid var(--gold-border); }
.c3-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.03); }
.c3-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.c3-word {
  display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.c3-connect   .c3-word { color: var(--green-lt); }
.c3-collab    .c3-word { color: var(--gold); }
.c3-create    .c3-word { color: #EF5350; }
.c3-desc { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }

.hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

/* scroll hint */
.scroll-hint {
  position: absolute; bottom: 28px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.scroll-arrow {
  width: 18px; height: 18px;
  border-right: 2px solid var(--gold); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold);
  transform: rotate(45deg);
  animation: bounce 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes bounce {
  0%,100% { transform: rotate(45deg) translate(0,0); }
  50%      { transform: rotate(45deg) translate(4px,4px); }
}

/* ============================================================
   TICKER
   ============================================================ */
.ticker-wrap { overflow: hidden; background: var(--gold); padding: 10px 0; }
.ticker {
  display: flex; white-space: nowrap;
  animation: tick 30s linear infinite;
}
.ticker span {
  display: inline-block; padding: 0 26px;
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--navy);
}
.ticker .dot { opacity: .4; }
@keyframes tick {
  0%   { transform: translateX(0); }
  100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 2 — ABOUT NISHANT
   ============================================================ */
#about { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: var(--navy-mid); }
.about-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 380px 1fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center;
}
/* image column */
.about-img-col { position: relative; }
.about-frame {
  width: 100%; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
}
.about-frame img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
.about-ph {
  width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, var(--navy-lt), var(--slate));
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.about-ph::before { content: '👤'; font-size: 56px; }
.exp-badge {
  position: absolute; bottom: -16px; right: -16px;
  width: 90px; height: 90px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--gold);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(201,146,42,.4);
}
.exp-badge .en { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy); line-height: 1; }
.exp-badge .el { font-size: 8px;  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--navy); text-transform: uppercase; }
.about-accent {
  position: absolute; top: -14px; left: -14px;
  width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 8px;
  border: 2px solid var(--gold); opacity: .14;
}
/* text column */
.about-name {
  font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 48px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 3px; line-height: 1;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.about-role {
  font-family: var(--ff-serif); font-style: italic;
  font-size: 18px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.about-bio { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.ex-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.ex-item {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500;
}
.ex-item::before { content: '◆'; color: var(--gold); font-size: 7px; margin-top: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.brand-row { margin-bottom: 24px; }
.brand-row h5 { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.brand-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
.bc {
  padding: 5px 13px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .5px; color: var(--muted);
  transition: all .2s;
}
.bc:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
.clinks { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.cl {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 7px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted);
  transition: all .22s;
}
.cl:hover { border-color: var(--gold-border); background: var(--gold-pale); color: var(--gold); }
.cl-ic {
  width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--gold-pale);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 3 — SERVICES
   ============================================================ */
#services { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: var(--navy); }
.svc-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 22px; }
.svc-card {
  background: var(--navy-mid); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 34px 26px;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all .32s;
}
.svc-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: var(--gold-border); box-shadow: 0 18px 56px rgba(0,0,0,.35); }
.svc-card::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity .32s;
}
.svc-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
.sv1::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--hat-blue), var(--green)); }
.sv2::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--hat-red)); }
.sv3::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--gold)); }
.svc-num { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 14px; font-family: monospace; }
.svc-icon { font-size: 34px; margin-bottom: 14px; display: block; }
.svc-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.svc-desc  { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.svc-list  { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.svc-list li { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; line-height: 1.5; }
.svc-list li::before { content: '→'; color: var(--gold); font-size: 11px; margin-top: 1px; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 4 — 6 THINKING HATS
   ============================================================ */
#hats { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: #090F18; }
.hats-intro {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 56px;
  align-items: center; margin-bottom: 52px;
}
.hats-intro-txt h2 {
  font-size: clamp(26px, 3.5vw, 44px); font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--white); line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.hats-intro-txt p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; }
.hats-bar-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
.hats-bar { height: 10px; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; }
.hb-big span { flex: 1; }
.hb-big .hs-w { background: var(--hat-white); }
.hb-big .hs-r { background: var(--hat-red); }
.hb-big .hs-b { background: var(--hat-black); }
.hb-big .hs-y { background: var(--hat-yellow); }
.hb-big .hs-g { background: var(--hat-green); }
.hb-big .hs-bl { background: var(--hat-blue); }
.hats-bar-col p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; }
.hats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 18px; }
.hc {
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 26px 20px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform .28s;
}
.hc:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
.hc-bar { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; }
.hc-w { background: rgba(216,216,204,.04); } .hc-w .hc-bar { background: var(--hat-white); }
.hc-r { background: rgba(183,28,28,.06);  } .hc-r .hc-bar { background: var(--hat-red); }
.hc-b { background: rgba(40,40,40,.18);   } .hc-b .hc-bar { background: var(--hat-black); }
.hc-y { background: rgba(201,146,42,.07); } .hc-y .hc-bar { background: var(--hat-yellow); }
.hc-g { background: rgba(46,125,50,.07);  } .hc-g .hc-bar { background: var(--hat-green); }
.hc-bl { background: rgba(21,101,192,.07);} .hc-bl .hc-bar { background: var(--hat-blue); }
.hc-emoji { font-size: 26px; margin-bottom: 10px; display: block; }
.hc-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.hc-w  .hc-name { color: #C8C8B8; }
.hc-r  .hc-name { color: #EF5350; }
.hc-b  .hc-name { color: #9E9E9E; }
.hc-y  .hc-name { color: var(--gold); }
.hc-g  .hc-name { color: var(--green-lt); }
.hc-bl .hc-name { color: #42A5F5; }
.hc-role { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.hc-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; }

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 5 — CASE STUDIES
   ============================================================ */
#cases { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: var(--navy-mid); }
.cases-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px; }
.cc {
  background: var(--navy); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 30px 26px; transition: all .3s;
}
.cc:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: var(--gold-border); box-shadow: 0 14px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.38); }
.cc-label {
  display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 11px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.lb-b  { background: rgba(21,101,192,.2);  color: #64B5F6; }
.lb-g  { background: rgba(46,125,50,.2);   color: #66BB6A; }
.lb-y  { background: rgba(201,146,42,.15); color: var(--gold); }
.lb-r  { background: rgba(183,28,28,.2);   color: #EF9A9A; }
.cc-fw { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 8px; font-family: monospace; }
.cc-title { font-family: var(--ff-serif); font-size: 19px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.35; }
.cc-body  { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.cc-out {
  background: rgba(46,125,50,.08); border: 1px solid rgba(46,125,50,.22);
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px;
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;
}
.cc-out-icon { font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cc-out-txt  { font-size: 12px; color: #66BB6A; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.55; }

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 6 — YOUTUBE
   ============================================================ */
#videos { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: var(--navy); }
.yt-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 52px; align-items: center; }
.yt-ch {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
  padding: 16px 18px; background: var(--navy-mid);
  border: 1px solid var(--gold-border); border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.yt-ch-icon {
  width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--green));
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.yt-ch-name   { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--white); }
.yt-ch-handle { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }
.yt-left h2 { font-size: clamp(26px, 3vw, 42px); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--white); line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.yt-left p  { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 26px; }
.yt-frame { border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--gold-border); aspect-ratio: 16/9; background: var(--navy-mid); }
.yt-frame iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; display: block; }

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 7 — BLOG
   ============================================================ */
#blog { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: #090F18; }
.blog-top {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 40px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px;
}
.blog-top-left .sec-title { text-align: left; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.blog-top-left .sec-sub   { text-align: left; margin: 0; }
/* Featured */
.blog-featured {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  background: var(--navy-mid); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 28px;
  transition: all .3s;
}
.blog-featured:hover { border-color: rgba(201,146,42,.45); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35); }
.bf-visual {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 72px; min-height: 240px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-lt), var(--slate));
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.bf-visual::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,27,42,.5), rgba(46,125,50,.15));
}
.bf-body { padding: 32px 28px; }
.bf-pin { display: inline-block; background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.bf-title { font-family: var(--ff-serif); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.3; }
.bf-excerpt { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.bf-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.bf-avatar { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--green)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); flex-shrink: 0; }
.bf-meta-txt .author { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); }
.bf-meta-txt .date   { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }
/* Grid */
.blog-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 22px; margin-bottom: 36px; }
.bc-card {
  background: var(--navy-mid); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  transition: all .32s;
}
.bc-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); border-color: var(--gold-border); box-shadow: 0 14px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.35); }
.bc-visual {
  aspect-ratio: 16/9; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 36px; background: var(--navy-lt);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.bc-visual::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,146,42,.06), rgba(46,125,50,.06));
}
.bc-body { padding: 22px 20px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.bc-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.bc-cat { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 12px; }
.bcat-s { background: rgba(21,101,192,.2); color: #64B5F6; }
.bcat-c { background: rgba(201,146,42,.15); color: var(--gold); }
.bcat-l { background: rgba(46,125,50,.2);   color: #66BB6A; }
.bcat-m { background: rgba(183,28,28,.15);  color: #EF9A9A; }
.bc-date { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }
.bc-title {
  font-family: var(--ff-serif); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.35;
  display: block; transition: color .2s;
}
.bc-title:hover { color: var(--gold); }
.bc-excerpt { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.75; flex: 1; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.bc-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.bc-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
.bc-av { width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--green)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); }
.bc-aname { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; }
.bc-rm { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); transition: opacity .2s; }
.bc-rm:hover { opacity: .7; }
/* Write CTA */
.write-cta {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  background: var(--navy-mid); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px 36px;
}
.wc-left h3 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.wc-left p  { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); max-width: 480px; }

/* ============================================================
   SECTION 8 — CONTACT
   ============================================================ */
#contact { padding: var(--sec) 0; background: var(--navy-mid); }
.contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 52px; align-items: start; }
.contact-txt h2 { font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 46px); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 3px; line-height: 1.05; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.contact-txt p  { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.cdetail { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.cd {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
  padding: 13px 16px; background: var(--navy);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;
  transition: all .22s;
}
.cd:hover { border-color: var(--gold-border); background: var(--gold-pale); transform: translateX(4px); }
.cd-ic { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--gold-pale); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cd-lbl { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); }
.cd-val { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); }
/* Form */
.contact-form {
  background: var(--navy); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
  border-radius: 14px; padding: 34px 28px;
}
.contact-form h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 22px; }
.frow2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; }
.fg { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.fg label { display: block; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 7px; }
.fg input, .fg select, .fg textarea {
  width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 11px 14px; color: var(--white);
  font-family: var(--ff-head); font-size: 13px; outline: none;
  transition: border-color .2s; -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none;
}
.fg input:focus, .fg select:focus, .fg textarea:focus { border-color: var(--gold); }
.fg textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 88px; }
.fg select option { background: var(--navy-mid); }
.fsub {
  width: 100%; background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy);
  border: none; padding: 13px; border-radius: 6px;
  font-family: var(--ff-head); font-weight: 800; font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer; transition: all .25s;
}
.fsub:hover { background: var(--gold-lt); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.fnote { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: .5px; }

/* ============================================================
   FOOTER
   ============================================================ */
footer { background: var(--navy); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 52px 0 24px; }
.footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 36px; margin-bottom: 44px; }
.footer-brand img { height: 46px; width: auto; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.footer-brand p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 210px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.socials { display: flex; gap: 9px; }
.soc {
  width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 7px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 15px; transition: all .2s;
}
.soc:hover { border-color: var(--gold); background: var(--gold-pale); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.fc h5 { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.fc ul { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; }
.fc ul li a { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); transition: color .2s; }
.fc ul li a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
.footer-bottom {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 22px;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;
}
.footer-bottom p { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }

/* ============================================================
   MOBILE RESPONSIVENESS
   ============================================================ */

/* Tablet (≤900px) */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  :root { --sec: 68px; }
  /* Nav */
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .ham { display: flex; }
  /* Hero 3-C */
  .c3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; max-width: 360px; }
  .c3-item + .c3-item { border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--gold-border); }
  /* About */
  .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
  .about-img-col { max-width: 320px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .exp-badge { right: 0; }
  .ex-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  /* Services */
  .svc-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  /* Hats */
  .hats-intro { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .hats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  /* Cases */
  .cases-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  /* YouTube */
  .yt-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 36px; }
  /* Blog */
  .blog-featured { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .bf-visual { min-height: 180px; }
  .blog-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .blog-top { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
  .write-cta { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
  /* Contact */
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
  .frow2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  /* Footer */
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
}

/* Mobile (≤600px) */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  :root { --sec: 52px; --sec-sm: 40px; }
  .wrap, .wrap-sm { padding: 0 16px; }
  .hero-btns { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .hero-btns .btn { width: 100%; max-width: 300px; text-align: center; }
  .hats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-form { padding: 24px 18px; }
  .write-cta { padding: 24px 20px; }
  .bf-body { padding: 22px 20px; }
  .about-name { font-size: 28px; }
  .nav-brand-text strong { font-size: 13px; }
}

/* Extra small (≤380px) */
@media (max-width: 380px) {
  .hero-title { font-size: 44px; }
  .nav-brand img { height: 34px; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<nav id="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a class="nav-brand" href="#hero">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Nexus Spark Logo"/>
      <div class="nav-brand-text">
        <strong>NEXUS SPARK</strong>
        <small>Connect · Collaborate · Create</small>
      </div>
    </a>
    <!-- Desktop -->
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#about">About</a>
      <a href="#services">Services</a>
      <a href="#hats">Framework</a>
      <a href="#cases">Case Studies</a>
      <a href="#blog">Blog</a>
      <a href="#videos">Insights</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Connect Now</a>
    </div>
    <!-- Hamburger -->
    <button class="ham" id="ham" aria-label="Toggle menu" onclick="toggleNav()">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>
  </div>
  <!-- Mobile Drawer -->
  <div class="nav-drawer" id="drawer">
    <a href="#about"    onclick="closeNav()">About Nishant</a>
    <a href="#services" onclick="closeNav()">Services</a>
    <a href="#hats"     onclick="closeNav()">6 Thinking Hats</a>
    <a href="#cases"    onclick="closeNav()">Case Studies</a>
    <a href="#blog"     onclick="closeNav()">Blog</a>
    <a href="#videos"   onclick="closeNav()">YouTube Insights</a>
    <a href="#contact"  onclick="closeNav()" class="nd-cta">Connect Now →</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 1 — BRAND HERO
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-body">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="hero-logo sr" alt="Nexus Spark"/>
    <p class="hero-eyebrow sr d1">nexus-spark.in &nbsp;·&nbsp; Business · Training · Careers</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title sr d2">
      <span>NEXUS</span><br/>
      <span class="ht2">SPARK</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-tag sr d3">Where Strategy Meets Transformation</p>

    <div class="c3 sr d3">
      <div class="c3-item c3-connect">
        <div class="c3-icon">🔗</div>
        <span class="c3-word">Connect</span>
        <span class="c3-desc">Build the right networks, relationships & market linkages</span>
      </div>
      <div class="c3-item c3-collab">
        <div class="c3-icon">🤝</div>
        <span class="c3-word">Collaborate</span>
        <span class="c3-desc">Co-create solutions with deep partnership & shared purpose</span>
      </div>
      <div class="c3-item c3-create">
        <div class="c3-icon">✨</div>
        <span class="c3-word">Create</span>
        <span class="c3-desc">Turn strategy into measurable impact & lasting results</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-btns sr d4">
      <a href="#services" class="btn btn-gold">Explore Services</a>
      <a href="#contact"  class="btn btn-out">Book a Session</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <div class="scroll-arrow"></div>
    Scroll
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker-wrap" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="ticker">
    <span>Business Consultancy</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Training &amp; Development</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Career Counseling</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Go-To-Market Strategy</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Sales Transformation</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Leadership Coaching</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Market Expansion</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Connect · Collaborate · Create</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Business Consultancy</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Training &amp; Development</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Career Counseling</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Go-To-Market Strategy</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Sales Transformation</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Leadership Coaching</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Market Expansion</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
    <span>Connect · Collaborate · Create</span><span class="dot">◆</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 2 — ABOUT NISHANT
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="about-grid">

      <!-- Image -->
      <div class="about-img-col sr-l">
        <div class="about-accent"></div>
        <div class="about-frame">
          <img src="20260423_173258-IMG_STYLE.jpg" alt="Nishant Shrivastava"
            onerror="this.parentNode.innerHTML='<div class=about-ph><span>NISHANT SHRIVASTAVA</span></div>'"/>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-badge">
          <span class="en">24+</span>
          <span class="el">Years</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Text -->
      <div class="sr-r">
        <div class="tag">The Mind Behind Nexus Spark</div>
        <h2 class="about-name">NISHANT<br/>SHRIVASTAVA</h2>
        <p class="about-role">Founder &amp; Principal Consultant</p>
        <p class="about-bio">
          With over 24 years of battle-tested experience across Sales, Marketing, and Business Expansion,
          Nishant Shrivastava has built market leadership for some of India's most iconic consumer brands.
          From architecting General Trade strategies to driving Modern Trade excellence — his career is
          a masterclass in connecting strategy to ground-level execution.
        </p>
        <p class="about-bio">
          Having led transformations at Cadbury's India, PepsiCo, Tata's, Samsung India, and Vodafone —
          and co-founded multiple startups from scratch — Nishant created Nexus Spark to transfer this
          lived wisdom to ambitious businesses and professionals ready to grow.
        </p>
        <div class="ex-grid">
          <div class="ex-item">Go-To-Market Strategy</div>
          <div class="ex-item">GT &amp; MT Channel Excellence</div>
          <div class="ex-item">Business Expansion</div>
          <div class="ex-item">Sales Force Transformation</div>
          <div class="ex-item">P&amp;L Management</div>
          <div class="ex-item">Startup Scaling (0→1)</div>
          <div class="ex-item">Leadership Development</div>
          <div class="ex-item">Career Architecture</div>
        </div>
        <div class="brand-row">
          <h5>Brands &amp; Organisations</h5>
          <div class="brand-chips">
            <span class="bc">Cadbury's India</span>
            <span class="bc">PepsiCo</span>
            <span class="bc">Tata's</span>
            <span class="bc">Samsung India</span>
            <span class="bc">Vodafone</span>
            <span class="bc">Startups (0→1)</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="clinks">
          <a href="tel:+919820019004" class="cl"><div class="cl-ic">📞</div>+91-9820019004</a>
          <a href="mailto:connect@nexus-spark.in" class="cl"><div class="cl-ic">✉️</div>connect@nexus-spark.in</a>
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/nishants2720" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="cl"><div class="cl-ic">💼</div>linkedin.com/in/nishants2720</a>
          <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@Nexus-Spark" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="cl"><div class="cl-ic">▶️</div>youtube.com/@Nexus-Spark</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 3 — SERVICES
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head sr">
      <div class="tag">What We Offer</div>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Three <span class="gold">Verticals</span>, One <span class="green">Vision</span></h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Each vertical is powered by real-world experience from India's most competitive markets — not theory, but transformation that has actually happened.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-grid">
      <div class="svc-card sv1 sr d1">
        <div class="svc-num">01 / 03</div>
        <span class="svc-icon">🏢</span>
        <div class="svc-title">Business Consultancy</div>
        <p class="svc-desc">Strategic clarity and tactical precision that turns ambition into market leadership — across General Trade and Modern Trade in India.</p>
        <ul class="svc-list">
          <li>Go-To-Market (GTM) Strategy Design</li>
          <li>GT &amp; MT Channel Strategy &amp; Execution</li>
          <li>Business Expansion &amp; Market Entry</li>
          <li>P&amp;L Management &amp; Revenue Optimisation</li>
          <li>Brand Building &amp; Trade Marketing</li>
          <li>Startup Scaling from Zero to Market</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-card sv2 sr d2">
        <div class="svc-num">02 / 03</div>
        <span class="svc-icon">🎯</span>
        <div class="svc-title">Training &amp; Development</div>
        <p class="svc-desc">Immersive, framework-driven programs that transform good teams into exceptional ones — bridging the gap between knowledge and performance.</p>
        <ul class="svc-list">
          <li>Sales Force Capability Building</li>
          <li>Leadership Development Programs</li>
          <li>Negotiation &amp; Persuasion Masterclasses</li>
          <li>Distributor &amp; Channel Partner Training</li>
          <li>6 Thinking Hats Decision Workshops</li>
          <li>Customer-Centric Selling Frameworks</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-card sv3 sr d3">
        <div class="svc-num">03 / 03</div>
        <span class="svc-icon">🚀</span>
        <div class="svc-title">Career Counseling</div>
        <p class="svc-desc">Your career is a product — it needs positioning, differentiation, and a growth strategy. We help professionals design careers that are intentional and future-proof.</p>
        <ul class="svc-list">
          <li>Career Mapping &amp; Roadmap Design</li>
          <li>Personal Brand &amp; LinkedIn Strategy</li>
          <li>Interview Prep &amp; Offer Negotiation</li>
          <li>Mid-Career Pivots &amp; Transitions</li>
          <li>Leadership Brand Architecture</li>
          <li>Entrepreneurship Readiness Assessment</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 4 — 6 THINKING HATS
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="hats">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hats-intro">
      <div class="hats-intro-txt sr-l">
        <div class="tag">Our Thinking Framework</div>
        <h2>The <span class="gold">6 Thinking Hats</span><br/>Methodology</h2>
        <p>Every Nexus Spark engagement is guided by Edward de Bono's renowned 6 Thinking Hats — ensuring every decision is examined through six distinct lenses for holistic, bias-free outcomes.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="hats-bar-col sr-r">
        <div class="hats-bar hb-big">
          <span class="hs-w"></span><span class="hs-r"></span><span class="hs-b"></span>
          <span class="hs-y"></span><span class="hs-g"></span><span class="hs-bl"></span>
        </div>
        <p>Six colours. Six perspectives. One complete picture. This methodology ensures no critical viewpoint is left unconsidered — bringing disciplined structured thinking to every business challenge, training session, and career decision we facilitate.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-gold" style="align-self:flex-start">Experience the Method</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hats-grid">
      <div class="hc hc-w sr d1"><div class="hc-bar"></div><span class="hc-emoji">🤍</span><div class="hc-name">White Hat</div><div class="hc-role">Data &amp; Facts</div><p class="hc-desc">Pure information — market data, research, numbers. No opinions, no biases. We begin every engagement from a position of absolute clarity.</p></div>
      <div class="hc hc-r sr d2"><div class="hc-bar"></div><span class="hc-emoji">❤️</span><div class="hc-name">Red Hat</div><div class="hc-role">Emotions &amp; Intuition</div><p class="hc-desc">We honour gut feel and market intuition. After 24+ years, we know that the instinct of an experienced professional is a data point that hasn't been written down yet.</p></div>
      <div class="hc hc-b sr d3"><div class="hc-bar"></div><span class="hc-emoji">🖤</span><div class="hc-name">Black Hat</div><div class="hc-role">Caution &amp; Risk</div><p class="hc-desc">We stress-test every strategy. Where are the vulnerabilities? Black hat thinking saves you from expensive mistakes before they happen.</p></div>
      <div class="hc hc-y sr d1"><div class="hc-bar"></div><span class="hc-emoji">💛</span><div class="hc-name">Yellow Hat</div><div class="hc-role">Optimism &amp; Value</div><p class="hc-desc">Every challenge holds a hidden opportunity. Yellow hat thinking identifies the upside and the value waiting to be unlocked by bold, well-considered action.</p></div>
      <div class="hc hc-g sr d2"><div class="hc-bar"></div><span class="hc-emoji">💚</span><div class="hc-name">Green Hat</div><div class="hc-role">Creativity &amp; Growth</div><p class="hc-desc">This is where the spark lives. New ideas, unconventional approaches, creative disruption that opens entirely new paths and unlocks growth others miss.</p></div>
      <div class="hc hc-bl sr d3"><div class="hc-bar"></div><span class="hc-emoji">💙</span><div class="hc-name">Blue Hat</div><div class="hc-role">Process &amp; Control</div><p class="hc-desc">The blue hat orchestrates the entire thinking process — managing structure, timeline, and output to ensure every engagement delivers measurable, real-world results.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION 5 — CASE STUDIES
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="cases">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head sr">
      <div class="tag">Proof of Impact</div>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Frameworks That <span class="gold">Delivered</span></h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Real strategies. Real markets. Real outcomes. Here is how structured thinking created measurable business transformation across industries.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cases-grid">
      <div class="cc sr d1">
        <div class="cc-label lb-b">GTM Strategy</div>
        <div class="cc-fw">Ansoff Matrix + Porter's 5 Forces</div>
        <h3 class="cc-title">FMCG Brand: Cracking Tier-2 &amp; Tier-3 Markets</h3>
        <p class="cc-body">A mid-size FMCG brand was plateauing in metros with negligible rural penetration. Using Ansoff's Market Development quadrant alongside Porter's analysis, we designed a phased GT expansion — identifying the right distributors, pack sizes, and pricing for Tier-2 cities first.</p>
        <div class="cc-out"><span class="cc-out-icon">📈</span><div class="cc-out-txt">Revenue grew 38% within 18 months. Distribution expanded from 3 to 9 states. Beat category growth by 2.4×.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cc sr d2">
        <div class="cc-label lb-y">Sales Transformation</div>
        <div class="cc-fw">McKinsey's 7-S Framework</div>
        <h3 class="cc-title">Consumer Electronics: Rebuilding a Demoralised Sales Force</h3>
        <p class="cc-body">A consumer electronics company was underperforming despite excellent products. A 7-S diagnostic revealed misalignment between Strategy (premium positioning) and Skills (mass-market behaviours). A targeted capability rebuild anchored the team around the brand's true premium equity.</p>
        <div class="cc-out"><span class="cc-out-icon">🏆</span><div class="cc-out-txt">Sales productivity improved 52%. Attrition dropped 40%. Top performers doubled within 2 quarters.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cc sr d3">
        <div class="cc-label lb-g">Startup Scaling</div>
        <div class="cc-fw">Business Model Canvas + Jobs-to-Be-Done</div>
        <h3 class="cc-title">D2C Startup: From Idea to ₹2 Cr Revenue in Year One</h3>
        <p class="cc-body">A health &amp; wellness startup had a compelling product but no commercial roadmap. Using the Business Model Canvas, we rebuilt their value proposition — identifying the true job-to-be-done, the right channel mix, and the content-commerce flywheel that made them discoverable.</p>
        <div class="cc-out"><span class="cc-out-icon">🚀</span><div class="cc-out-txt">Hit ₹2 Cr ARR in 11 months. Secured 3 modern trade chain listings. NPS of 72+.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cc sr d4">
        <div class="cc-label lb-r">Career Pivot</div>
        <div class="cc-fw">SWOT + Ikigai Framework</div>
        <h3 class="cc-title">Mid-Career Professional: From Sales Manager to Training Leader</h3>
        <p class="cc-body">A 35-year-old Sales Manager felt stuck — good performer, no forward clarity. A personal SWOT combined with Ikigai revealed an unexplored path into Sales Training &amp; L&amp;D where his experience became his most valuable product.</p>
        <div class="cc-out"><span class="cc-out-icon">⭐</span><div class="cc-out-txt">Transitioned to National Training Head. 60% salary increment. Published first training module in 6 months.</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════
     JAVASCRIPT (inline — single page)
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
/* ── Nav Toggle ── */
function toggleNav() {
  document.getElementById('ham').classList.toggle('open');
  document.getElementById('drawer').classList.toggle('open');
}
function closeNav() {
  document.getElementById('ham').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('drawer').classList.remove('open');
}

/* ── Scroll Shadow ── */
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  document.getElementById('nav').style.boxShadow =
    window.scrollY > 60 ? '0 4px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.55)' : 'none';
});

/* ── Active Nav Link ── */
var sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  var cur = '';
  sections.forEach(function(s) {
    if (window.scrollY >= s.offsetTop - 90) cur = s.id;
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(function(a) {
    a.style.color = '';
    if (a.getAttribute('href') === '#' + cur && !a.classList.contains('nav-cta'))
      a.style.color = 'var(--gold)';
  });
});

/* ── Scroll Reveal (IntersectionObserver) ── */
var io = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
  entries.forEach(function(e) {
    if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); io.unobserve(e.target); }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });
document.querySelectorAll('.sr, .sr-l, .sr-r').forEach(function(el) { io.observe(el); });

/* ── Contact Form ── */
function submitForm(e) {
  var btn = e.target;
  btn.textContent = '✓ Message Sent! We\'ll connect with you soon.';
  btn.style.background = 'var(--green)';
  btn.disabled = true;
  setTimeout(function() {
    btn.textContent = 'Send Message →';
    btn.style.background = 'var(--gold)';
    btn.disabled = false;
  }, 5000);
}

/* ── Close drawer on outside click ── */
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  var ham = document.getElementById('ham');
  var drawer = document.getElementById('drawer');
  if (!ham.contains(e.target) && !drawer.contains(e.target)) {
    ham.classList.remove('open');
    drawer.classList.remove('open');
  }
});
</script>

</body>
</html>
